Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search Mortgage LOS for the Pham purchase on Pineville Matthews using mortgage_los_search_loans with query "Pham" or "Pineville Matthews." The agent discovers loan LN-2026-00623 at 3190 Pineville-Matthews Rd, Charlotte, NC 28211, status clear_to_close, closing_date 2026-03-23, borrower Vincent Pham (los_borrower_d3ca864b20b5, vincent.pham@gmail.com), assigned processor Sofia Reyes (los_staff_afc9caafae9d), and realtor Daniel Morris (realtor144@gmail.com). The agent may also use mortgage_los_get_loan with loan_number "LN-2026-00623" or mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id with loan_id "los_loan_f84eb4f4af44" to retrieve full loan details.
OE 2: Search Slack messages for discussion about the Pham closing using conversations_search_messages with search_query "LN-2026-00623" or "Pham" (or similar). The agent discovers messages in #closings (channel C003) showing that docs were fully signed on April 10 but the lender wire missed the cutoff, so there was no recording that day. Recording was pushed to Monday. The seller's agent called in heated because the seller's contingent buy was now in play since proceeds would not hit until Monday. The closing attorney confirmed the file is queued for Monday recording.
OE 3: Search emails for communications about the Pham file or LN-2026-00623 using search_emails with query "Pham" or "LN-2026-00623" or "Pineville." The agent examines email threads to determine the last direct communication with Vincent Pham and/or his realtor Daniel Morris, and to identify whether there has been any recent outreach or concern raised by either party. This establishes the gap in borrower/realtor contact that Priya wants to address.
OE 4: Search Mortgage LOS for the Selwyn Ave file using mortgage_los_search_loans with query "Selwyn" or "6042 Selwyn Ave." The agent discovers loan LN-2026-00628, status underwriting, borrower Marcus Fletcher (los_borrower_ea2475bd45c4, marcus.fletcher@gmail.com), assigned processor Elena Marchetti (los_staff_c6b42763fb1f), realtor Emily Flores (realtor382@gmail.com), property 6042 Selwyn Ave, Charlotte, NC 28217. The agent may also use mortgage_los_get_borrower_by_id with borrower_id "los_borrower_ea2475bd45c4" to get full borrower details.
OE 5: Search Slack and/or email for communications about the Selwyn Ave income verification issue using conversations_search_messages with search_query "LN-2026-00628" or "Selwyn" (or similar) and/or search_emails with query "LN-2026-00628" or "Selwyn" or "income." The agent discovers Slack messages in #loan-processing (channel C002) showing: the IRS 4506-T transcript returned $72,000 in income versus what was originally claimed, the borrower responded angrily disputing the IRS transcript and refusing to accept a reduced loan amount, and Amy Chen sent restructure options based on the $72K verified income with a denial risk warning. The agent also discovers Amy Chen's email to the borrower explaining the income discrepancy and outlining restructure options (reduce loan amount, lower purchase price, or find a compensating factor).
OE 6: Search Mortgage LOS for the Kang file using mortgage_los_search_loans with query "Kang" or "Idlewild." The agent discovers loan LN-2026-00613, status conditional_approval, borrower Sandra Kang (los_borrower_aa68c38766dc, sandra.kang@gmail.com), assigned processor Sofia Reyes (los_staff_afc9caafae9d), realtor Steven Nelson (realtor381@gmail.com), property 4150 Idlewild Rd, Charlotte, NC 28212, rate_lock_expiration 2026-04-14.
OE 7: Search Slack and/or email for communications about the Kang disclosure complication using conversations_search_messages with search_query "LN-2026-00613" or "Kang" or "disclosure" (or similar) and/or search_emails with query "LN-2026-00613." The agent discovers Slack messages in #loan-processing (channel C002) describing: the borrower requested a switch from a 30 year term to a 15 year term, the Closing Disclosure APR was measured against the old 30 year Loan Estimate because no revised LE was issued after the term change, the APR variance exceeds tolerance, and corrected disclosures plus a new 3 business day waiting period are required before closing. The agent also discovers Denise Holloway's email to Sofia Reyes (CC Nadia Osman) confirming the redisclosure requirement and instructing the file be held until corrected disclosures are issued. Additionally, Slack messages mention a closing delay notification was sent to the borrower and that the rate lock (originally expiring 3/23, since updated to 4/14) may need extension pricing.
OE 8: Search Mortgage LOS for the Nguyen denial on Queens Road using mortgage_los_search_loans with query "Nguyen" or "Queens Rd." The agent discovers loan LN-2024-00202, status denied, borrower Russell Nguyen (los_borrower_e52d8f536659, russell.nguyen@hotmail.com), co-borrower Catherine Nguyen (catherine.nguyen@comcast.net), assigned processor Elena Marchetti (los_staff_c6b42763fb1f), realtor Michael Huffman (michael.huffman@icloud.com), property 3218 Queens Rd, Charlotte, NC 28216, loan_type conventional, purchase_price $210,000, loan_amount $168,000.
OE 9: Search emails for Nguyen post denial communications using search_emails with query "Nguyen" or "LN-2024-00202." The agent discovers: (a) the denial email from Plaza Home Mortgage to Elena Marchetti citing the property failed minimum appraisal requirements, (b) Elena's internal email forwarding the denial to Priya and asking how to handle borrower communication, (c) Priya's email to Russell and Catherine explaining the denial, apologizing, and offering to discuss alternative paths forward, and (d) Russell's reply asking what the specific appraisal issues were and whether his rate lock survived the denial. The agent also finds Priya's follow-up response (email_9933) explaining the specific findings, foundation settlement and water damage in the crawl space that failed the lender's minimum property standards and advising that his rate lock expired with the denial. This confirms Priya did communicate with the borrower after the adverse action, Russell responded with follow-up questions, and Priya answered them directly.
OE 10: Search Stripe for charges and refunds related to the Nguyen loan using stripe_search_customers with query "Nguyen" or stripe_search_charges with query "Nguyen" or "LN-2024-00202" or stripe_list_charges with customer_id "cus_NAxvpCPZygFP0xOL." The agent discovers Stripe customer cus_NAxvpCPZygFP0xOL (Russell Nguyen) with three charges: a $50 credit report fee (ch_GRdpO8bKNttjOaKD, not refunded), a $500 application deposit (ch_Z0vljVaveRxnQ291, refunded=1, amount_refunded=$500), and a $500 appraisal fee (ch_EvGTmpdt9jxadPJN, not refunded). The agent then confirms the deposit refund using stripe_list_refunds with charge_id "ch_Z0vljVaveRxnQ291" or stripe_get_refund with refund_id "re_BTTwHPhmjxf4L3Hq," finding a $500 refund with status succeeded. This confirms the application deposit was returned.
OE 11: Look up Priya Desai's contact details using contacts_search_contacts with query "Priya Desai" or contacts_get_contacts. The agent discovers Priya's email address (priya.desai@keystonemortgage.com), which is needed as the sender for all outgoing emails.
OE 12: Search CRM for deals and contacts related to each of the four borrowers using crm_search_deals with dealname "Pham" or "Kang" or "Fletcher" or "Nguyen" and/or crm_search_contacts with full_name "Vincent Pham," "Sandra Kang," "Marcus Fletcher," or "Russell Nguyen." The agent discovers the existing Nguyen CRM deal (crm_deal_5ee2acae117f, dealname "CONVENTIONAL - Russell Nguyen (LN-2024-00202)," dealstage appointmentscheduled, amount $168,000). The agent finds no existing CRM deals or CRM contacts for Vincent Pham, Sandra Kang, or Marcus Fletcher.
OE 13 (Write Action): Send a summary email to Priya using send_email with sender priya.desai@keystonemortgage.com and recipient priya.desai@keystonemortgage.com. The subject references a borrower relationship review or pipeline meeting prep. The body covers all four borrower files:
(1) Pham / Pineville Matthews: status clear_to_close, docs signed April 10 but lender wire missed cutoff and recording pushed to Monday, seller agent upset about delayed proceeds, no direct communication with Vincent or realtor Daniel Morris since clear to close.
(2) Fletcher / Selwyn Ave: status underwriting, income verification dispute with IRS transcript showing $72K, borrower responded angrily, Amy Chen sent restructure options, no direct outreach from Priya recently.
(3) Kang / Idlewild Rd: status conditional_approval, 30yr to 15yr term switch triggered redisclosure requirement with APR tolerance violation, corrected disclosures and 3 day wait needed, rate lock expiration concern, borrower was notified of delay but unclear if she understands the situation.
(4) Nguyen / Queens Rd: status denied, appraisal failed minimum property standards (foundation settlement, water damage), application deposit ($500) was refunded successfully, Priya did send post denial email and Russell responded asking for details, Catherine was CCed.
OE 14 (Write Action): Send warm, personal check-in emails from Priya to borrowers and/or realtors who haven't heard from Keystone recently, using send_email with sender priya.desai@keystonemortgage.com. The agent determines which recipients need outreach based on the communication gaps discovered in OEs 1 through 9. Expected recipients include some or all of:
(a) Vincent Pham (vincent.pham@gmail.com) regarding his closing experience and next steps.
(b) Daniel Morris (realtor144@gmail.com), the Pham realtor, as a referral relationship Priya wants to protect.
(c) Marcus Fletcher (marcus.fletcher@gmail.com) regarding the Selwyn Ave underwriting progress and checking in on how he is doing.
(d) Sandra Kang (sandra.kang@gmail.com) regarding the disclosure situation and making sure she understands what happened and why her timeline shifted.
(e) Russell Nguyen (russell.nguyen@hotmail.com) and/or Catherine Nguyen (catherine.nguyen@comcast.net) regarding post denial follow-up, confirming the deposit was returned, and discussing future options.
Each email should be warm and personal in tone, not boilerplate, reflecting Priya's empathetic style.
OE 15 (Write Action): Create CRM engagement notes for each borrower relationship using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE" (or similar type such as "EMAIL"), a descriptive body summarizing the current file status, recent borrower communications, any concerns raised, and outreach taken. The agent creates engagements for each of the four relationships (Pham, Fletcher/Selwyn, Kang, Nguyen). Since none of the four borrowers have existing CRM contacts, the agent first creates new CRM contacts for each using crm_create_contact (with full_name and email, e.g., full_name "Vincent Pham", email "vincent.pham@gmail.com") and then links each engagement via the contact_ids parameter. For the Nguyen relationship, the agent may reference the existing CRM deal (crm_deal_5ee2acae117f, dealname "CONVENTIONAL - Russell Nguyen (LN-2024-00202)") in the engagement body for context, but the engagement itself is linked via the newly created Nguyen CRM contact, not the deal. This gives Priya clean engagement history going into the pipeline review meeting.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

Oracle Events
OE 1: Search Mortgage LOS for the Pham purchase on Pineville Matthews using mortgage_los_search_loans with query "Pham" or "Pineville Matthews." The agent discovers loan LN-2026-00623 at 3190 Pineville-Matthews Rd, Charlotte, NC 28211, status clear_to_close, closing_date 2026-03-23, borrower Vincent Pham (los_borrower_d3ca864b20b5, vincent.pham@gmail.com), assigned processor Sofia Reyes (los_staff_afc9caafae9d), and realtor Daniel Morris (realtor144@gmail.com). The agent may also use mortgage_los_get_loan with loan_number "LN-2026-00623" or mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id with loan_id "los_loan_f84eb4f4af44" to retrieve full loan details.
OE 2: Search Slack messages for discussion about the Pham closing using conversations_search_messages with search_query "LN-2026-00623" or "Pham" (or similar). The agent discovers messages in #closings (channel C003) showing that docs were fully signed on April 10 but the lender wire missed the cutoff, so there was no recording that day. Recording was pushed to Monday. The seller's agent called in heated because the seller's contingent buy was now in play since proceeds would not hit until Monday. The closing attorney confirmed the file is queued for Monday recording.
OE 3: Search emails for communications about the Pham file or LN-2026-00623 using search_emails with query "Pham" or "LN-2026-00623" or "Pineville." The agent examines email threads to determine the last direct communication with Vincent Pham and/or his realtor Daniel Morris, and to identify whether there has been any recent outreach or concern raised by either party. This establishes the gap in borrower/realtor contact that Priya wants to address.
OE 4: Search Mortgage LOS for the Selwyn Ave file using mortgage_los_search_loans with query "Selwyn" or "6042 Selwyn Ave." The agent discovers loan LN-2026-00628, status underwriting, borrower Marcus Fletcher (los_borrower_ea2475bd45c4, marcus.fletcher@gmail.com), assigned processor Elena Marchetti (los_staff_c6b42763fb1f), realtor Emily Flores (realtor382@gmail.com), property 6042 Selwyn Ave, Charlotte, NC 28217. The agent may also use mortgage_los_get_borrower_by_id with borrower_id "los_borrower_ea2475bd45c4" to get full borrower details.
OE 5: Search Slack and/or email for communications about the Selwyn Ave income verification issue using conversations_search_messages with search_query "LN-2026-00628" or "Selwyn" (or similar) and/or search_emails with query "LN-2026-00628" or "Selwyn" or "income." The agent discovers Slack messages in #loan-processing (channel C002) showing: the IRS 4506-T transcript returned $72,000 in income versus what was originally claimed, the borrower responded angrily disputing the IRS transcript and refusing to accept a reduced loan amount, and Amy Chen sent restructure options based on the $72K verified income with a denial risk warning. The agent also discovers Amy Chen's email to the borrower explaining the income discrepancy and outlining restructure options (reduce loan amount, lower purchase price, or find a compensating factor).
OE 6: Search Mortgage LOS for the Kang file using mortgage_los_search_loans with query "Kang" or "Idlewild." The agent discovers loan LN-2026-00613, status conditional_approval, borrower Sandra Kang (los_borrower_aa68c38766dc, sandra.kang@gmail.com), assigned processor Sofia Reyes (los_staff_afc9caafae9d), realtor Steven Nelson (realtor381@gmail.com), property 4150 Idlewild Rd, Charlotte, NC 28212, rate_lock_expiration 2026-04-14.
OE 7: Search Slack and/or email for communications about the Kang disclosure complication using conversations_search_messages with search_query "LN-2026-00613" or "Kang" or "disclosure" (or similar) and/or search_emails with query "LN-2026-00613." The agent discovers Slack messages in #loan-processing (channel C002) describing: the borrower requested a switch from a 30 year term to a 15 year term, the Closing Disclosure APR was measured against the old 30 year Loan Estimate because no revised LE was issued after the term change, the APR variance exceeds tolerance, and corrected disclosures plus a new 3 business day waiting period are required before closing. The agent also discovers Denise Holloway's email to Sofia Reyes (CC Nadia Osman) confirming the redisclosure requirement and instructing the file be held until corrected disclosures are issued. Additionally, Slack messages mention a closing delay notification was sent to the borrower and that the rate lock (originally expiring 3/23, since updated to 4/14) may need extension pricing.
OE 8: Search Mortgage LOS for the Nguyen denial on Queens Road using mortgage_los_search_loans with query "Nguyen" or "Queens Rd." The agent discovers loan LN-2024-00202, status denied, borrower Russell Nguyen (los_borrower_e52d8f536659, russell.nguyen@hotmail.com), co-borrower Catherine Nguyen (catherine.nguyen@comcast.net), assigned processor Elena Marchetti (los_staff_c6b42763fb1f), realtor Michael Huffman (michael.huffman@icloud.com), property 3218 Queens Rd, Charlotte, NC 28216, loan_type conventional, purchase_price $210,000, loan_amount $168,000.
OE 9: Search emails for Nguyen post denial communications using search_emails with query "Nguyen" or "LN-2024-00202." The agent discovers: (a) the denial email from Plaza Home Mortgage to Elena Marchetti citing the property failed minimum appraisal requirements, (b) Elena's internal email forwarding the denial to Priya and asking how to handle borrower communication, (c) Priya's email to Russell and Catherine explaining the denial, apologizing, and offering to discuss alternative paths forward, and (d) Russell's reply asking what the specific appraisal issues were and whether his rate lock survived the denial. The agent also finds Priya's follow-up response (email_9933) explaining the specific findings, foundation settlement and water damage in the crawl space that failed the lender's minimum property standards and advising that his rate lock expired with the denial. This confirms Priya did communicate with the borrower after the adverse action, Russell responded with follow-up questions, and Priya answered them directly.
OE 10: Search Stripe for charges and refunds related to the Nguyen loan using stripe_search_customers with query "Nguyen" or stripe_search_charges with query "Nguyen" or "LN-2024-00202" or stripe_list_charges with customer_id "cus_NAxvpCPZygFP0xOL." The agent discovers Stripe customer cus_NAxvpCPZygFP0xOL (Russell Nguyen) with three charges: a $50 credit report fee (ch_GRdpO8bKNttjOaKD, not refunded), a $500 application deposit (ch_Z0vljVaveRxnQ291, refunded=1, amount_refunded=$500), and a $500 appraisal fee (ch_EvGTmpdt9jxadPJN, not refunded). The agent then confirms the deposit refund using stripe_list_refunds with charge_id "ch_Z0vljVaveRxnQ291" or stripe_get_refund with refund_id "re_BTTwHPhmjxf4L3Hq," finding a $500 refund with status succeeded. This confirms the application deposit was returned.
OE 11: Look up Priya Desai's contact details using contacts_search_contacts with query "Priya Desai" or contacts_get_contacts. The agent discovers Priya's email address (priya.desai@keystonemortgage.com), which is needed as the sender for all outgoing emails.
OE 12: Search CRM for deals and contacts related to each of the four borrowers using crm_search_deals with dealname "Pham" or "Kang" or "Fletcher" or "Nguyen" and/or crm_search_contacts with full_name "Vincent Pham," "Sandra Kang," "Marcus Fletcher," or "Russell Nguyen." OE 13 (Write Action): Send a summary email to Priya using send_email with sender priya.desai@keystonemortgage.com and recipient priya.desai@keystonemortgage.com. The subject references a borrower relationship review or pipeline meeting prep. The body covers all four borrower files:
(1) Pham / Pineville Matthews: status clear_to_close, docs signed April 10 but lender wire missed cutoff and recording pushed to Monday, seller agent upset about delayed proceeds, no direct communication with Vincent or realtor Daniel Morris since clear to close.
(2) Fletcher / Selwyn Ave: status underwriting, income verification dispute with IRS transcript showing $72K, borrower responded angrily, Amy Chen sent restructure options, no direct outreach from Priya recently.
(3) Kang / Idlewild Rd: status conditional_approval, 30yr to 15yr term switch triggered redisclosure requirement with APR tolerance violation, corrected disclosures and 3 day wait needed, rate lock expiration concern, borrower was notified of delay but unclear if she understands the situation.
(4) Nguyen / Queens Rd: status denied, appraisal failed minimum property standards (foundation settlement, water damage), application deposit ($500) was refunded successfully, Priya did send post denial email and Russell responded asking for details, Catherine was CCed.
OE 14 (Write Action): Send warm, personal check-in emails from Priya to borrowers and/or realtors who haven't heard from Keystone recently, using send_email with sender priya.desai@keystonemortgage.com. The agent determines which recipients need outreach based on the communication gaps discovered in OEs 1 through 9. Expected recipients include some or all of:
(a) Vincent Pham (vincent.pham@gmail.com) regarding his closing experience and next steps.
(b) Daniel Morris (realtor144@gmail.com), the Pham realtor, as a referral relationship Priya wants to protect.
(c) Marcus Fletcher (marcus.fletcher@gmail.com) regarding the Selwyn Ave underwriting progress and checking in on how he is doing.
(d) Sandra Kang (sandra.kang@gmail.com) regarding the disclosure situation and making sure she understands what happened and why her timeline shifted.
(e) Russell Nguyen (russell.nguyen@hotmail.com) and/or Catherine Nguyen (catherine.nguyen@comcast.net) regarding post denial follow-up, confirming the deposit was returned, and discussing future options.
Each email should be warm and personal in tone, not boilerplate, reflecting Priya's empathetic style.
OE 15 (Write Action): Create CRM engagement notes for each borrower relationship using crm_create_engagement with engagement_type "NOTE" (or similar type such as "EMAIL"), a descriptive body summarizing the current file status, recent borrower communications, any concerns raised, and outreach taken. The agent creates engagements for each of the four relationships (Pham, Fletcher/Selwyn, Kang, Nguyen). Since none of the four borrowers have existing CRM contacts, the agent first creates new CRM contacts for each using crm_create_contact (with full_name and email, e.g., full_name "Vincent Pham", email "vincent.pham@gmail.com") and then links each engagement via the contact_ids parameter. For the Nguyen relationship, the agent may reference the existing CRM deal (crm_deal_5ee2acae117f, dealname "CONVENTIONAL - Russell Nguyen (LN-2024-00202)") in the engagement body for context, but the engagement itself is linked via the newly created Nguyen CRM contact, not the deal. This gives Priya clean engagement history going into the pipeline review meeting.
